ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/newspack-plugin
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/newspack-plugin
Language: php
An advanced open-source publishing and revenue-generating platform for news organizations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Automattic/wordpress-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Automattic/wordpress-mcp
Language: php
WordPress MCP — This repository will be deprecated as stable releases of mcp-adapter become available. Please use https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter for ongoing development and support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreBooking/librebooking
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreBooking/librebooking
Language: php
LibreBooking is an open-source resource scheduling solution. It provides a flexible, mobile-friendly, and extensible interface for organizations to manage resource reservations. The "develop" branch contains the latest code of the project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LibreSign/libresign
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LibreSign/libresign
Language: php
✍️ Nextcloud app to sign PDF documents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Qloapps/QloApps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Qloapps/QloApps
Language: php
QloApps is a Free and Open-source hotel management and reservation system to take a hotel business online. QloApps offers a Property Management System (PMS), a Booking Engine, and an attractive Hotel Website. Elevate hotel operations with QloApps to streamline processes and provide an enhanced experience for both hoteliers and guests.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: akaunting/akaunting
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/akaunting/akaunting
Language: php
Online Accounting Software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elementor/elementor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elementor/elementor
Language: php
The most advanced frontend drag & drop page builder. Create high-end, pixel perfect websites at record speeds. Any theme, any page, any design.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fruitcake/laravel-debugbar
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fruitcake/laravel-debugbar
Language: php
Debugbar for Laravel (Integrates PHP Debug Bar)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: glpi-project/glpi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/glpi-project/glpi
Language: php
GLPI is a Free Asset and IT Management Software package, Data center management, ITIL Service Desk, licenses tracking and software auditing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/ai
Language: php
The Laravel AI SDK provides a unified, expressive API for interacting with AI providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

Language: php
omegaUp automatic programming contest evaluator & arena

PHP Static Analysis Tool - discover bugs in your code without running it!

A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.
